languages.text: "Не трогай этот механизм, элантах, пока не сможешь осознать его природу и назначение..." {n}Ирлиэт бросает на вас оценивающий взгляд.{/n} "... и смирись с тем, что, возможно, этот момент не наступит никогда".

traits.locale_text: Драфт: не трогай, пока не поймём, что именно перед нами, хотя ты и не поймешь, мон-кай

languages.text: "Do not touch that mechanism, elantach, until you grasp its nature and purpose..." {n}Yrliet casts an appraising glance at you.{/n} "...and accept the fact that perhaps that moment will never come."
languages.original_text: "Не трогай этот механизм, элантах, пока не сможешь осознать его природу и назначение..." {n}Ирлиэт бросает на вас оценивающий взгляд.{/n} "... и смирись с тем, что, возможно, этот момент не наступит никогда".

traits.locale_text: "Do not touch that mechanism, elantach, until you grasp its nature and purpose..." {n}Yrliet casts an appraising glance at you.{/n} "...and accept the fact that perhaps that moment will never come."
"Do not touch that mechanism, elantach, until you grasp its nature and purpose..." {n}Yrliet casts an appraising glance at you.{/n} "...and accept the fact that perhaps that moment will never come."
"Do not touch that mechanism, elantach, until you grasp its nature and purpose..." {n}Yrliet casts an appraising glance at you.{/n} "...and accept the fact that perhaps that moment will never come."

languages.text: “别碰那台装置，外界人，除非你搞清楚了它的本质和用途……”{n}伊莉耶特向你投来审视的一瞥。{/n}“……并且接受一个事实：你可能永远都搞不明白。”
languages.original_text: "Do not touch that mechanism, elantach, until you grasp its nature and purpose..." {n}Yrliet casts an appraising glance at you.{/n} "...and accept the fact that perhaps that moment will never come."

traits.locale_text: “别碰那台装置，外界人，除非你搞清楚了它的本质和用途……”{n}伊莉耶特向你投来审视的一瞥。{/n}“……并且接受一个事实：你可能永远都搞不明白。”

languages.text: « Abstenez-vous de toucher ce mécanisme, elantach, tant que vous ne comprenez ni sa nature ni son but, {n}déclare Yrliet en vous jaugeant du regard,{/n} et acceptez le fait que ce moment ne viendra peut-être jamais. »
languages.original_text: "Do not touch that mechanism, elantach, until you grasp its nature and purpose..." {n}Yrliet casts an appraising glance at you.{/n} "...and accept the fact that perhaps that moment will never come."

traits.locale_text: « Abstenez-vous de toucher ce mécanisme, elantach, tant que vous ne comprenez ni sa nature ni son but, {n}déclare Yrliet en vous jaugeant du regard,{/n} et acceptez le fait que ce moment ne viendra peut-être jamais. »

languages.text: "Mekanizmaya dokunma elantach, doğasını ve amacını kavrayana dek dokunma..." {n}Yrliet sana yargılayıcı bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "O anın asla gelmeyeceği gerçeğini kabul edene dek dokunma."
languages.original_text: "Do not touch that mechanism, elantach, until you grasp its nature and purpose..." {n}Yrliet casts an appraising glance at you.{/n} "...and accept the fact that perhaps that moment will never come."

traits.locale_text: "Mekanizmaya dokunma elantach, doğasını ve amacını kavrayana dek dokunma..." {n}Yrliet sana yargılayıcı bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "O anın asla gelmeyeceği gerçeğini kabul edene dek dokunma."

languages.text: «No toques ese mecanismo hasta que comprendas su naturaleza y propósito...». {n}Yrliet te evalúa con la mirada.{/n} «... y acepta que ese momento podría no llegar nunca».
languages.original_text: "Do not touch that mechanism, elantach, until you grasp its nature and purpose..." {n}Yrliet casts an appraising glance at you.{/n} "...and accept the fact that perhaps that moment will never come."

traits.locale_text: «No toques ese mecanismo hasta que comprendas su naturaleza y propósito...». {n}Yrliet te evalúa con la mirada.{/n} «... y acepta que ese momento podría no llegar nunca».

languages.text: "Fasst diesen Mechanismus nicht an, Elantach, bis Ihr seine Natur und Bestimmung versteht ..." {n}Yrliet wirft dir einen abwägenden Blick zu.{/n} "... und akzeptiert den Umstand, dass dieser Moment vielleicht nie kommen wird."
languages.original_text: "Do not touch that mechanism, elantach, until you grasp its nature and purpose..." {n}Yrliet casts an appraising glance at you.{/n} "...and accept the fact that perhaps that moment will never come."

traits.locale_text: "Fasst diesen Mechanismus nicht an, Elantach, bis Ihr seine Natur und Bestimmung versteht ..." {n}Yrliet wirft dir einen abwägenden Blick zu.{/n} "... und akzeptiert den Umstand, dass dieser Moment vielleicht nie kommen wird."

languages.text: 「その機構に触るな、エランタ。その性質と目的を理解し、そしてその瞬間は訪れないかもしれないという事実を受け入れるまでには。」{n}イルリエットはあなたをじっと見つめる.{/n}「...そうなるかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "Do not touch that mechanism, elantach, until you grasp its nature and purpose..." {n}Yrliet casts an appraising glance at you.{/n} "...and accept the fact that perhaps that moment will never come."

traits.locale_text: 「その機構に触るな、エランタ。その性質と目的を理解し、そしてその瞬間は訪れないかもしれないという事実を受け入れるまでには。」{n}イルリエットはあなたをじっと見つめる.{/n}「...そうなるかもしれない。」
